summary: Configured ProtonMail Bridge as a home-manager systemd service, enabling automatic startup with user session. Removed manual package from home.packages as the service module handles installation.

artifacts.summary: Added services.protonmail-bridge configuration block, removed protonmail-bridge from home.packages
Implementation summary for ProtonMail Bridge systemd service configuration

completion_data.completion_summary: Enabled ProtonMail Bridge systemd user service via home-manager module with info-level logging. The service will auto-start with user session, replacing manual package installation.

next_steps: Run 'home-manager switch' to apply changes, then verify service with 'systemctl --user status protonmail-bridge'
